section.heading: Authorization for appropriations

content.p: For the purposes of carrying out this part, there is authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2009 through 2013.

section.sourceCredit: (July 1, 1944, ch. 373, title XXX, § 3018, as added Pub. L. 111–5, div. A, title XIII, § 13301, Feb. 17, 2009, 123 Stat. 258.)
